note: These are sample promotion records for future planning and homepage demo cards. They are not live paid ads and should not be shown as real sponsored placements until business rules, disclosures, payments, tracking, and approval are ready.

placementRules.frequencyCap: Demo cards should not block search results or pretend to be organic recommendations.

promotions.label: Demo sponsored example
promotions.headline: Today's featured taco idea in Dallas
promotions.offerText: A sample card for a lunch or dinner taco special. This shows how a local restaurant offer could appear at the right food moment.
promotions.reason: Shown when someone searches for tacos, Mexican food, Dallas, lunch, dinner, or cheap eats.
promotions.disclosure: Demo only. Not a paid placement. Restaurant details must be confirmed before visiting.
